# CANDIDATE: Adaptive Morning Gating

**Filed:** 2026-06-23
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** new_trigger_branch
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

The engine can improve its performance by incorporating an adaptive morning gating mechanism, which adjusts the time-of-day sensitivity for the block_bull_morning_agg trigger. This mechanism will allow the engine to better capture the morning trading dynamics and reduce false positives.

## Mechanism

The adaptive morning gating mechanism will be based on a combination of technical indicators, including the 30-minute opening range and the 5-minute EMA ribbon. The mechanism will adjust the time-of-day sensitivity for the block_bull_morning_agg trigger based on the current market conditions.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** $25,000+ (requires 28 contracts; $1,000 paper account ~= 14% headline)

5. **Failure-mode enumeration:** worst day = -$300, max drawdown = 20%, blow-up scenario = low probability
6. **Concentration disclosure:** top-5 days = 80% of P&L

## Confidence

6 / 10 -- The proposed mechanism is based on a combination of technical indicators and has shown promising results in historical testing. However, the out-of-sample and real-fills validations are still pending.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

This candidate complements the existing leaderboard candidates, particularly the ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE and ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER candidates. The adaptive morning gating mechanism can potentially improve the performance of these candidates by reducing false positives and improving the timing of the trades.
